executive_summary: Build workflow failure detected in repository scib_new on branch main. The GitHub Actions workflow failed during execution at run ID 22730291852. This appears to be a configuration or workflow dispatch error as the build logs indicate workflow-level failure rather than Maven compilation or test failures. Immediate investigation of the GitHub Actions workflow configuration and runner environment is required.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions build workflow failed to complete successfully. The workflow dispatch or execution encountered an error that prevented the Maven build from running or completing.
errors.root_cause: Workflow configuration error, runner environment issue, or workflow dispatch failure. The build logs indicate 'Build failed - see action URL for details' without specific Maven error output, suggesting the failure occurred at the workflow orchestration level rather than during Maven execution.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage. No artifacts can be produced until the workflow configuration is corrected. This prevents all downstream processes including testing, deployment, and release activities.

steps: 1. Review .github/workflows/build.yml for syntax errors or misconfigurations
2. Check GitHub Actions runner availability and health
3. Verify workflow permissions and secrets are correctly configured
4. Review workflow dispatch parameters and inputs
5. Check for rate limiting or quota issues on GitHub Actions
6. Validate workflow triggers and event configurations
recommended_fixes.automation_script:
# Workflow validation script
# 1. Validate YAML syntax
# 2. Check runner labels
# 3. Verify secrets availability
# 4. Test workflow dispatch
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Ensure workflow changes are reviewed and approved per change management policy. Document all configuration changes in audit log.

compliance_audit.findings: Critical workflow failure detected. Build pipeline is non-operational. Requires immediate remediation.

next_steps: 1. Access GitHub Actions workflow run at https://github.com/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/runs/22730291852
2. Review detailed workflow logs for specific error messages
